summary: Comprehensive testing of Hishab Nikash Pro accounting application completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (45/45 tests passed). Frontend navigation and core features working well. Sidebar scrolling fixed and all 19 nav items functional. Dashboard shows real KPI data. Some UI interaction issues found with modals and mobile responsiveness.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal not opening when Add Customer button clicked
Modal not opening when Add Product button clicked
Create Entry modal not opening properly
Send button not found in chat interface
Adjust Stock button not found on inventory page
Low Stock Alert button not found on inventory page

integration_issues.issue: Record Payment modal not opening from invoice detail page
Add Item/Product button not found in Create Invoice page

design_issues.issue: Mobile hamburger menu not implemented, tables may break on mobile
Status filter buttons (All/Draft/Sent/Paid/Overdue) replaced with dropdown - functionality exists but different UI pattern

passed_tests: All 45 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Sidebar scrolling and all 19 navigation items clickable
Dashboard KPI cards with real calculated data (Total Sales, Collections, Receivables, Payables, Inventory Value, Bank/Cash, Gross Profit, Net Profit)
All major page navigation (Dashboard, Sales, Customers, Products, Chart of Accounts, AI Assistant, Settings, Reports)
Reports Hub with all report links (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Sales, Expense)
Settings page with all 5 tabs (Company, Invoice, Team, Alerts, CSV Import)
Invoice detail page layout with proper data display
Print and Packing List button presence
Sales page with real invoice data and status filters (dropdown format)
Chart of Accounts page loads with Add Account functionality
AI Assistant page loads with chat input
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal opening issues for Create Customer, Create Product, and Journal Entries. Implement Record Payment modal functionality. Add mobile hamburger menu. Fix AI Assistant send button. Add missing buttons: Adjust Stock, Low Stock Alert, Add Item in Create Invoice. Ensure all modals use proper dialog roles and open/close correctly.
